name: playwright-openai-plugin
description: Installable Codex plugin and local Playwright CLIs for logged-in OpenAI, CSDN, X Articles, and Xiaohongshu browser workflows.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/status.js && node --check src/cdp.js && node --check src/output.js && node --check src/browser.js && node --check src/paths.js && node --check src/discover.js && node --check src/model.js && node --check src/chat.js && node --check src/images.js && node --check src/action-pack.js && node --check src/jobs.js && node --check src/csdn.js && node --check src/x-articles.js && node --check src/xhs.js && node --check scripts/csdn-publish.mjs && node --check scripts/x-articles-publish.mjs && node --check scripts/xhs-publish.mjs && npm test
